mentions.raw_name: Stannis's crown (circlet of red gold with flame-shaped points)
Standard of the fiery heart (crowned stag within)
Penrose banner (crossed quills, white on russet)
Lord Alester Florent (Lord of Brightwater Keep)
Shireen Baratheon (referenced indirectly as Stannis's daughter)
R'hllor / Lord of Light (Melisandre's god; nightfires at dusk; flaming heart sigil)
The god of darkness / the enemy (referenced by Davos; Melisandre warns against naming him)
Old gods and traditional Westerosi faith (Ser Cortnay's "other gods"; implied references to septons)
Lyseni (Salladhor Saan described as "a Lysene brigand")
Stannis's crown (circlet of red gold with flame-shaped points)
Standard of the fiery heart with crowned stag
Penrose banner (crossed quills, white on russet)
Shadow birthing (Melisandre gives birth to a shadow creature)
Flame visions / fire prophecy (Melisandre sees futures in flames — Renly's doom, Cortnay's death, alternate future of Renly smashing Stannis)
Spells woven into Storm's End walls ("dark walls that no shadow can pass")
Multiple shadows / multiple futures ("Some lights cast more than one shadow"; men cast shadows across the future)
Melisandre's supernatural glow (sweat seems to glow with its own light)
Protection from poison (Melisandre survived Cressen's poisoned wine)
Shadow assassination (implied: Renly killed by a shadow; Melisandre says he was "unprotected")
Nightmares (Stannis plagued by dreams of Renly's death since it happened; maester's potions do not help)
War of the Five Kings (ongoing; Stannis vs. Joffrey, Robb Stark also fighting)
Siege of Storm's End (current, by Stannis)
Siege of Storm's End (historical, sixteen years prior, by Tyrells and Redwynes during Robert's Rebellion)
Robert's Rebellion (referenced via the historical siege)
King (Stannis claims; Joffrey holds; Robb Stark holds in the North)
Castellan of Storm's End (Ser Cortnay Penrose)
The Evenstar (Brienne's father, Lord of Tarth)
